name: smart-elevator-twin
description: Agentic AI-driven digital twin platform for smart and secure elevator management — ESP32-S3, MQTT/TLS, Eclipse Ditto, Next.js SCADA dashboard (ElevatorOS), n8n agent workflows, TimescaleDB.

scripts.validate: npm run test && npm run test:dashboard && npm run validate:n8n && npm run test:python && npm run validate:topics && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
